name: autobrowse
description: Autonomous browser skill generator: runs tasks, reads execution logs, optimizes strategy, and graduates a durable SKILL.md + JS script.

body.task:
Execute the script using Lightpanda and capture the full stdout/stderr/network trace.

Command to run: `lightpanda agent script-{loop.iteration}.js`.

Return the exact log output and exit code.

Analyze the run log: {outputs.run-trace.output}.

Did it succeed? Are there redundant clicks, slow waits, or missing elements? Update strategy.md with optimizations.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching this shape:
{
  "status": "converged" | "improving" | "blocked",
  "unnecessary_steps_removed": ["step"],
  "updated_selectors": ["selector"],
  "reasoning": "short verdict"
}
